components.title: Edge Telemetry Agent
components.description: Hardened on-device agent; fully implements its baseline.

control-implementations.description: Full implementation of the hardening baseline.

implemented-requirements.description: Capability-scoped access enforced on every IPC call.
Append-only local audit log shipped to the collector.
mTLS to the collector; certificate pinning.
Local spool encrypted at rest with a TPM-sealed key.
Self-integrity check and tamper alerting on boot.
